content.en:
No Road Tower.

"Lord of the Ancients, I want to trade treasures containing the ultimate path with others, I don't know if there is a channel?"

Ye Tian asked.

"A treasure that contains the ultimate !!"

The Lord of the Ancient was taken aback, this was a treasure that he couldn't even obtain, Ye Tian even wanted to trade such a treasure!

"Lord of Endless, this kind of treasure is too rare, even if we have it, I'm afraid we will use it, and there are very few Extreme Perfect Masters to keep it! "The Lord of the Ancients.

"I also have such treasures in my hands!" Ye Tian took out a piece of armor fragment.

Seeing this fragment, the Lord of the Ancient looked shocked.

"The treasure containing the extreme path of extreme defense seems to be a fragment!"

The Lord of the Ancients knew that this thing was very valuable, and for those who wanted to comprehend the Extreme Defense Extreme Realm, the value of this thing was too great!

Ye Tiandao: "Lord of the Ancients, there are perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm who want to comprehend the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao at the end of the realm, maybe there is a similar treasure in their hands, I want to exchange it with each other." "

"Endless Lord, you don't need this fragment?"

The Lord of the Ancient wondered curiously.

"No need!" Ye Tian said.

The Lord of the Ancient was a little shocked, who wouldn't need such a treasure, although just one piece of fragment could not help him comprehend the Extreme Defense Pole, but collect it slowly, and there would be hope to comprehend the Extreme Defense Pole in the future!

Unless Ye Tian has already comprehended the Extreme Defense Extreme, but is it possible?

"Ye Tian, our Extreme Realm Perfect Controller can enter the Extreme Dao Network with the will, the Extreme Dao Network is an illusory world built by the Virtual Lord, and the Virtual Lord has mastered the Virtual Extreme Dao, so even the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea cannot invade the Extreme Dao Network. We can post tasks and ask for help on Jidao.com. I can help you hang a mission, but I can't guarantee that there will be no Extreme Perfect Controller to trade with you. "The Lord of the Ancients.

"Okay, then thank you Lord of the Ancients!"

As he spoke, Ye Tian took out another fragment, the one he had taken from the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and there was only a trace of the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao contained in it, and he was ready to give it to the Lord of the Ancient Realm.

"Lord of the Ancients, this fragment will be given to you as a reward!"

Ye Tian said.

"What, this treasure is for me!!"

The Lord of the Ancient was shocked.

In the realm of scarce resources, such a treasure is enough for the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm to snatch and fight!

Refuse?

He found that he couldn't refuse!

"Endless Lord, you are too polite, don't worry, I will do my best to help you connect with the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller who is willing to exchange!"

Then, Ye Tian left.

After Ye Tian left, the Lord of Canggu entered the Extreme Dao Network, issued a mission, and then contacted one of his old friends and asked them to help too.

......

Dragonscale Heavenly River.

This is the fifth-ranked Eternal Heaven and Earth at the End of the Realm, which is a little more powerful than the Eternal Ruins, and this Eternal Heaven and Earth has more than eighty Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers.

At this time, one of the perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm of the Dragon Scale Heavenly River, the Lord of Bear Blood, was visiting the Extreme Dao Network, and he also saw a task issued by the Lord of the Ancients.

"Treasures containing the Extreme Defense Pole, exchanging treasures containing other Extreme Defense Extremes?

The Lord of Bear Blood was a little curious, he also knew the Lord of the Ancients, after all, there were so many Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the end of the realm, even if they were not familiar with each other, they knew each other.

And the Lord of the Ancient is undoubtedly a weaker Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, it stands to reason that it is unlikely that he will have such a treasure, and even if he does, he is willing to trade it?

Even if many Extreme Realm Perfect Masters obtain treasures that are not suitable for them, the Extreme Extreme Path contained in them is not the Extreme Path they major in, but they will keep it, and if they gather enough similar treasures in the future, they can completely transfer to another Extreme Path!

"Although I don't know why the Lord of the Ancient Ages took out such a treasure, I just want such a treasure!"

The Lord of Bear Blood himself majored in the Defensive Pole Dao, and his Defensive Pole Dao had already reached the consummation realm, and his will was in the direction of the Extreme Defense Pole Dao, and he had comprehended and practiced for an unknown number of billions of eternal years.

Moreover, he had also been lucky enough to obtain a treasure containing the Extreme Defense Pole, but there was still no way to help him comprehend the Extreme Defense Pole.

Of course, if he gathers enough Extreme Defense Extreme Dao treasures, he can slowly improve his Defense Extreme Dao, and one day he will be able to truly comprehend the Extreme Defense Extreme Dao.

At this time, he took out a stone.

This stone contains the power of thunder, and it is the power of the extreme thunder path.

"The primordial thunder stone that contains the extreme thunder of the extreme path, it's a pity that I haven't comprehended the extreme path of thunder, and the extreme path of thunder is not suitable for me, even if I re-enlighten, the speed of cultivation is too slow, and I can't cultivate to the extreme realm by relying on the extreme path of thunder, and no matter how many treasures of this kind are. The Lord of Bear Blood sighed.

It had been endless years since he had obtained this treasure, and he had remained with him and had not been exposed.

He was afraid that he would be exposed, and those Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the end of the Realm, who were much stronger than him, would forcibly trade with him, after all, those few who had comprehended and cultivated were the Thunder Pole Dao, and they were not far from the Extreme Thunder Pole Dao.

And if he can't get the treasure he needs, he won't trade it, otherwise he will give it away for nothing!

"There's no point in me keeping this primordial thunder stone, so let's trade with the Lord of the Ancients!"

The Lord of Bear Blood decided.

So, he immediately contacted the Lord of the Ancients.

......

Outside the Ruins of Eternity.

Two figures appeared one after another, namely the Lord of the Ancient and the Lord of Bear Blood.

"Lord of the Ancients, you said that you have a treasure containing the Extreme Defense Path in your hand, can you take it out and take a look, if it is true, I can take out another treasure and exchange it with you. "Lord of Bear Blood.

"Of course, there is, but it's not me who is trading with you. The Lord of Canggu said, and with a wave of his hand, a figure appeared, and it was Ye Tian.

"Infinity Lord!"

The Lord of Bear Blood recognized Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian had a great reputation and a high talent, and he would definitely become the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm in the future.

He didn't expect that it was Ye Tian, the Endless Lord, who was really trading with him, not the Lord of the Ancients.

Of course, it doesn't matter who trades with him, as long as it's true.

"I've seen the Lord of Bear Blood!"

After Ye Tian finished greeting, he took out his armor fragments.

When the Lord of Bear Blood saw the armor fragment, his expression was shocked, "It turned out to be the original black armor fragment!"

"What is the original black armor, the Lord of Bear Blood knows the origin of this fragment?"

Ye Tian was surprised.
